description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on push events with concurrency control. The workflow has three jobs: build-linux, build-macos-current, and a commented-out build-windows job. The build-linux and build-macos-current jobs check out two repositories, install dependencies using apt or brew, and then build the project using make. The build-macos-current job uploads a build artifact. The build-windows job is currently commented out but appears to set up an MSYS2 environment, install dependencies, build the project, and create an installer.
